scripts.typecheck: next typegen && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const target=path.join('.next','types','cache-life.d.ts');const source=path.join('.next','dev','types','cache-life.d.ts');if(!fs.existsSync(target)){fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(target),{recursive:true});if(fs.existsSync(source)){fs.copyFileSync(source,target);}else{fs.writeFileSync(target,'// generated fallback for typecheck\n');}}" && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit --incremental false
